immutable_record_notice: Once frozen, this study manifest is immutable. Changes require a new record version linked to the superseded raw-byte digest.

subject.name: Synthetic memory-function taxonomy fixture
subject.definition: A deliberately synthetic category system used only to demonstrate the foundational-study contract.
subject.boundary: The fixture evaluates category structure only; it does not evaluate a memory mechanism or biological validity.

competency_questions: Can the taxonomy distinguish retained event reports from generalized propositions without assigning one item to incompatible categories?
integrity_constraints: Every test case must resolve to an allowed category or an explicit unresolved classification.
primary_method_profile.adjudication_method: Two independent synthetic rule applications followed by explicit disagreement recording.
primary_method_profile.coverage_rule: Exercise every declared category, every declared exclusion, and at least one unresolved boundary case.

research_question: Does the synthetic taxonomy classify its declared positive, negative, and boundary fixtures consistently with its own definitions?

hypothesis.claim: The synthetic taxonomy will satisfy its declared structural competency question and integrity constraint on the planned fixtures.
hypothesis.competing_explanation: Any apparent consistency is caused by incomplete fixtures that omit category boundaries.
hypothesis.predicted_observation: All fixtures produce traceable classifications and all negative cases are rejected by the relevant category rule.
hypothesis.falsifier: Any fixture violates an integrity constraint or a declared negative case is accepted without an unresolved classification.

analyses.question: Do the planned fixtures satisfy the declared competency and integrity rules?
analyses.method: Apply each versioned category rule to every positive, negative, and boundary fixture and retain individual validation outcomes.
analyses.decision_rule: Reject the claim if any integrity violation occurs or coverage omits a declared category or exclusion.

replication_criteria: A separate evaluator obtains the same individual conformance outcomes from the frozen definitions and fixtures.

rejection_criteria.condition: Any fixture violates a declared integrity constraint.
rejection_criteria.rationale: Structural consistency is the exact bounded claim under study.

rejection_criteria.condition: The fixture set omits any declared category or exclusion.
rejection_criteria.rationale: An incomplete suite cannot support the planned coverage assessment.

ethics_scope.rationale: This is a synthetic contract fixture and contains no participant data.

assets: Integrity of category definitions and fixture provenance
controls: Freeze exact raw-byte digests before execution
security_and_privacy_analysis.data_retention_and_deletion: Retain the synthetic fixture family for schema regression; remove no adverse or null disposition from a frozen record family.
residual_risks: Structural conformance could be over-interpreted as external validity despite the explicit boundary.

limitations: This draft fixture contains no executed analysis and supports no empirical or maturity claim.
Structural consistency does not establish biological validity, completeness, usefulness, or mechanism effectiveness.

mechanism_maturity_boundary.rationale: The subject is a foundational taxonomy, not a versioned memory mechanism.
